prompt: For session `j1620210710_.nwb`, which probe model is each electrode group using?
behavioral_checks: Restricts ONLY `ElectrodeGroup` by `nwb_file_name` (which it has as a PK field) — does NOT restrict `Probe` by `nwb_file_name` (Probe is keyed by `probe_id` and has no session FK; the restriction would silently no-op)
Joins on the shared `probe_id` column (ElectrodeGroup's nullable FK to Probe) to surface `probe_type` / Probe-side fields
Mentions that `-> [nullable] Probe` means some electrode groups may have NULL `probe_id` and won't survive the inner join — handle via projection or a separate restriction if those rows matter
